name: Michiru Isumi
description: __Height:__ 164 cm (5' 5") __Nationality:__ Japanese __Affiliation:__ Hakuryo Hiiragi & University, United Nations Army Special Task Force A-01 __Rank:__ Captain __TSF:__ Type 94 Shiranui, TF-4J Gekishin Commander of the Special Task Force A-01 "Isumi's Valkyries", and second eldest of four daughters in the Isumi family. Adored by those who know her personally, Michiru is straightforward both in command in personally to her subordinates, seldom mincing her words when speaking of serious matters.

name: Mofurun
description: A teddy bear who was given to [Mirai](https://anilist.co/character/125756/Mirai-Asahina) by her grandmother on her first birthday. She gained the ability to speak when Mirai became a Pretty Cure together with [Liko](https://anilist.co/character/125949/Liko-Izayoi). She ends her sentences with "~mofu". Mofurun is a warm-hearted, soft-spoken companion. She can be curious, gluttonous, and simple-minded, getting sad and worried during serious moments. She also has a responsible side, worrying about

name: Moomintroll
description: Moomintroll (Mumintrollet) - a spirited troll teen with a keen sense of adventure and fun and a generous spirit. Moomin lives life fully, and views the world with a feeling of wonderment for such simple pleasures as collecting stones and shells. As gullible as he is enthusiastic, he is also naive and extremely good-natured. He is Snufkin's best friend, and often feels sad when Snufkin leaves the Moomin Valley during the winter. Hehas a crush on the Snork Maiden and although the two sometimes are

name: Mun-Deok Son
description: Son Hak's adoptive father. Form General of the Wind tribe.

name: Munsu
description: The anti-heroic protagonist of the series and a third mahai angyo onshi from the fallen kingdom of Jushin. Despite the common perception held by Jushin's former citizens that angyo onshi are virtuous and bearers of justice, Munsu usually comes across as somewhat amoral and does not believe in helping people who refuse to help themselves. When he does help others, his methods almost always involve excessive bloodshed, lying, torture, and other questionable acts. ~! Munsu suffers from a curse that

name: Nagao  Kagetora
description: __Height:__ 167 cm Lancer of Eight Flowers is the Lancer-class Servant summoned by Satsuki Yumizuka in the Imperial Capital Holy Grail Strange Story Memoirs of Koha-Ace. She is also able to be summoned by Ritsuka Fujimaru in the Grand Orders of Fate/Grand Order.

name: Nearl
description: __Birthplace__: Kazimierz __Race__: Kuranta Nearl, once known as the Radiant Knight of Kazimierz, is a member of the Infected support group, "Followers." She has demonstrated remarkable combat techniques and military discipline, whether it's covering allies, mobile warfare, all-out assault, or field battle. Currently a heavy-weapon Operator for Rhodes Island and provides command and combat support in person.

name: Palutena
description: Palutena is the goddess of light, the rightful ruler of Skyworld, the patron deity of Pit and the Centurions, and the guardian of humans. She first appeared in Kid Icarus for the Nintendo Entertainment System in 1986, as a damsel in distress captured by the wicked Medusa, followed by an appearance in Kid Icarus: Of Myths and Monsters for the Game Boy in 1991 - where she tasked Pit with finding the Three Sacred Treasures before being petrified by the villainous Orcos and becoming a damsel in dist

description: A warrior who is crowned the strongest man in the world.

name: Philia
description: Philia is an Einzbern homunculus involved in the False Holy Grail War of Fate/strange fake. ~!As of the summoning of True Berserker, her body has been possessed by the goddess Ishtar.!~ (Source: TYPE-MOON wiki)

name: Regis K. Landegre
description: Regis is a young noble. His caretaker is his companion Seira. Regis has high regard for elegance and is extremely prideful. He values manners and honor primarily. He and Seira appeared to investigate the possible appearance of an infected/mutant amongst the humans. Regis is fairly short and when Ikhan first sees him, he becomes excited at having someone the same size as him. Ikhan has always felt self-conscious, but Regis does not feel bothered by his height. ~! His grandfather is an old well-re

name: Ren Nanahoshi
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'6") A first-year university student in the Law department. He is the vocalist for the band Argonavis. Unable to forget the excitement of an outdoor live he saw when he was a kid, he started singing with dreams of someday standing on the big stage. However, due to his poor communication skills, he continues to sing in private karaoke rooms alone. In one of those times, Goryou Yuuto who was looking for a vocalist found out about his abilities, and he joined Argonavis. Ren is

name: Rockman X
description: Original robot created by Dr. Thomas Light and is the template of all the reploids. Joined the Maverick/Irregular Hunters due to being partially responsible in designing the reploids who went maverick. He was set to sleep in a capsule after his creation in Dr. Light secret Laboratory. Centuries later, he was discovered by Dr.Cain, who was himself a great scientist and who was the one to create the reploid generation using X (name by which he is referred in the game and the serie) as background,
mediaTitles: Mega Man X - The Day of Sigma

name: Ronove
description: The 27th highest ranking earl of hell named after the demon of the same name. Ronove serves as Beatrice's (and later, Battler's) butler and head furniture. He often serves black tea and cookies to Beatrice and her guests. Nonchalant, he often bears a mysterious smile that is hard to interpret, even for his master. Even though he is bound by contract with Beatrice, he does not hesitate to state facts to tease her. He shares a link with Genji Ronoue, similar to the one held by Virgilia and Chiyo K

name: Sakura Kasugano
description: A schoolgirl at Tamagawa Minami High, Sakura has a fascination with martial artists - particularly Ryu. Despite her age and lack of formal training, she has managed to duplicate many of the Shotokan techniques, even if her attacks are raw and less effective. Undaunted by her inexperience, she has been known to pick fights with older, larger fighters in order to practice her skills.
mediaTitles: TONIKAWA: Over The Moon For You

name: Sakutarou Morishige
description: __Height:__ 178 cm (5'10") A student from Kisaragi Academy's Class 2-9. Mayu's longtime friend and a Theater Club's member who likes acting. Usually quiet, and allows only Mayu to call him by a nickname, "Shig (Shige-nii)".

name: Seiya Ichijou
description: The young, ambitious manager of an underground casino owned by the Teiai Corporation. He is the mastermind of the Bog, a rigged pachinko machine in which every ball is worth 4,000 yen, with a payout of over 500 million. He is Kaiji's opponent in the second part of the manga.

name: Shamil  Volkov
nativeName: シャミール・ヴォルコフ
description: __Height:__ 180 cm Shamil was a Russian Cosmonaut residing on the International Space Station (ISS) when the Petrification on Earth's surface occurred. He returned to Earth's surface along with the rest of the ISS crew, helping to establish Ishigami Village. After returning to Earth, Shamil married fellow ISS astronaut [Connie Lee](https://anilist.co/character/150510/Connie-Lee) and had several children together.
